name: deus_discover
description: Search Deus service listings (plain-language + filters). Read-only.

name: deus_get_service
description: Get a Deus service listing by id. Read-only.

name: deus_quote
description: Get a signed EIP-712 price quote for a service operation. Read-only.

name: deus_invoke
description: Invoke a Deus proxy service (direct-rail pay + signed receipt). WRITE: spends via agent wallet.

name: deus_invocation_status
description: Get invocation status and receipt metadata. Read-only.

name: deus_my_spend
description: Placeholder for caller spend summary (not implemented server-side in phase 2).
